title: marketing — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — provider CRUD by owner + admin; event + delivery reads by owner + admin + marketing role + support role; dead-letter management by owner + admin (replay requires Enterprise entitlement). Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant support tooling for ops + support cross-tenant P1 review. All tenant-plane permissions carry the `marketing.` prefix (or `platform.marketing.` on the platform audience) per hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules.

permissions.name: marketing.events.dispatch
permissions.description: Manual re-dispatch of an existing event. Support tool.

permissions.name: marketing.providers.create
permissions.description: Configure a new marketing provider. Credentials are financial-critical.

permissions.name: marketing.providers.test
permissions.description: Send a synthetic test event via a provider's sandbox endpoint.

permissions.name: marketing.providers.reset-circuit-breaker
permissions.description: Manually reset an OPEN circuit-breaker. Every reset writes an audit row + increments circuit_breaker_reset_count.

permissions.name: marketing.roas.view
permissions.description: Access the ROAS dashboard. Medium+ via marketing_roas_report entitlement.

permissions.name: marketing.reports.consent-suppressions.view
permissions.description: Compliance surface: view consent-suppressed events over a date range.

permissions.name: platform.marketing.providers.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant provider config read (redacted — no credentials).

permissions.name: platform.marketing.dead_letters.replay
permissions.description: Cross-tenant support-intervention dead-letter replay. Every fire notifies the tenant admin + writes audit with 7-year retention.

permissions.name: platform.marketing.circuit_breakers.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant view of OPEN circuit-breakers. Powers the ops health dashboard.
